description: DMV Fraud Detection — identifies suspicious patterns in title applications, registration renewals, and identity documents to flag potential fraud for investigation

hard_stops.label: Identity Document Forgery Detected
hard_stops.logic: Document authentication analysis indicates forgery or alteration of identity documents — transaction blocked and referred to investigations unit

hard_stops.label: SSN Already Associated with Different Identity
hard_stops.logic: Social Security number provided is already associated with a different verified identity in the system — potential identity theft

hard_stops.label: Known Fraud Ring Pattern
hard_stops.logic: Transaction matches a known fraud ring pattern (shared address, sequential applications, linked applicants) — immediate hold for review

soft_flags.label: Elevated Risk Score
soft_flags.logic: Transaction risk score exceeds normal threshold — flag for manual review before processing

soft_flags.label: Rapid Title Transfers
soft_flags.logic: Vehicle has changed hands 3 or more times in the past 12 months — possible title washing or curbstoning
